sequenceDiagram(name = "LoginFlow") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val ui = lifeline(name = "LoginInterface")
    val auth = lifeline(name = "AuthenticationService")
    val db = lifeline(name = "UserDatabase")
    message(from = user, to = ui, label = "enterCredentials()")
    message(from = ui, to = auth, label = "authenticate(credentials)")
    message(from = auth, to = db, label = "loadUserRecord()")
    reply(from = db, to = auth, label = "userRecord")
    message(from = auth, to = auth, label = "verifyPasswordHash()")
    reply(from = auth, to = ui, label = "accessToken")
    reply(from = ui, to = user, label = "loginSuccess")
}

@startuml
actor User
participant "Login Interface" as LI
participant "Authentication Service" as AS
participant "User Database" as DB

User -> LI : enterCredentials()
LI -> AS : forwardCredentials()
AS -> DB : loadUserRecord()
DB --> AS : userRecord
AS -> AS : verifyPasswordHash()
AS --> LI : accessToken
LI --> User : loginSuccess()
@enduml

sequenceDiagram

  User->>LoginInterface: enterCredentials()

  UserDatabase-->>AuthService: userRecord
  AuthService->>AuthService: verifyPasswordHash()
  AuthService-->>LoginInterface: accessToken
  LoginInterface-->>User: loginSuccess()

sequenceDiagram(name = "BankTransfer") {
    val customer = lifeline(name = "Customer") { isActor = true }
    val app = lifeline(name = "BankingApp")
    val transferService = lifeline(name = "TransferService")
    val accountDb = lifeline(name = "AccountDatabase")

    message(from = customer, to = app, label = "initiateTransfer()")
    message(from = app, to = transferService, label = "submitTransferRequest()")
    message(from = transferService, to = accountDb, label = "queryBalance()")
    reply(from = accountDb, to = transferService, label = "balance")
    message(from = transferService, to = accountDb, label = "postTransfer()")
    reply(from = accountDb, to = transferService, label = "bookingSuccess")
    reply(from = transferService, to = app, label = "transactionReference")
    reply(from = app, to = customer, label = "confirmation")
}

@startuml
actor Buyer
participant WebShop
participant SearchService
participant ProductCatalog

Buyer -> WebShop : enterSearchTerm()
WebShop -> SearchService : search(term)
SearchService -> ProductCatalog : findProducts(term)
ProductCatalog --> SearchService : results
SearchService --> WebShop : resultsList

alt results found
    WebShop -> ProductCatalog : loadImages(results)
    ProductCatalog --> WebShop : images
end

WebShop --> Buyer : resultsPage
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor Buyer
  participant WebShop
  participant SearchService
  participant ProductCatalog
  Buyer->>WebShop: enterSearchTerm()
  WebShop->>SearchService: search(term)
  SearchService->>ProductCatalog: findProducts(term)
  ProductCatalog-->>SearchService: products
  SearchService-->>WebShop: results

    message(from = gateway, to = limiter, label = "checkQuota(clientId)")
    reply(from = limiter, to = gateway, label = "quotaExhausted")

    message(from = client, to = client, label = "wait(backoffPeriod)")

    message(from = gateway, to = limiter, label = "checkQuota(clientId)")
    reply(from = limiter, to = gateway, label = "quotaAvailable")
    message(from = gateway, to = backend, label = "forwardRequest()")
    reply(from = backend, to = gateway, label = "data")
    reply(from = gateway, to = client, label = "data")

actor User
participant Client
participant AuthServer
participant SessionStore
participant ResourceServer
participant AuditLog

User -> Client : login()
Client --> User : redirect to AuthServer

AuthServer -> SessionStore : create session
SessionStore --> AuthServer : session created
AuthServer --> User : deliver login form

User -> AuthServer : submit credentials

alt credentials valid
    AuthServer -> AuthServer : verify credentials
    AuthServer --> User : redirect with authorization code
    User -> Client : callback(code)
    Client -> AuthServer : exchange code for token
    AuthServer --> Client : access token
    AuthServer -> AuditLog : log token issuance

    opt scope includes profile
        Client -> ResourceServer : request user data(token)
        ResourceServer -> AuthServer : verify token
        AuthServer --> ResourceServer : token valid
        ResourceServer --> Client : user data
    end

    Client --> User : login successful
else credentials invalid
    AuthServer -> SessionStore : discard session
    SessionStore --> AuthServer : session discarded
    AuthServer --> User : error message
end
@enduml

    val sessionStore = lifeline(name = "Session Store")
    val resourceServer = lifeline(name = "Resource Server")
    val auditLog = lifeline(name = "Audit Log")

    message(from = user, to = client, label = "initiate login")
    message(from = client, to = authServer, label = "redirect to authorization endpoint")

actor Driver
participant Camera
participant Radar
participant FusionUnit
participant BrakingAssistant
participant ControlUnit
participant DiagnosticLog

Camera -> FusionUnit : deliverCameraData()
Radar -> FusionUnit : deliverRadarData()

FusionUnit -> FusionUnit : computeEnvironmentModel()
FusionUnit -> BrakingAssistant : reportCollisionRisk(ttc)

alt ttc below critical threshold
    BrakingAssistant -> Driver : acousticWarning()
    BrakingAssistant -> BrakingAssistant : initiateBrakingManeuver()
    loop until vehicle stationary
        BrakingAssistant -> ControlUnit : adjustBrakePressure()
        ControlUnit --> BrakingAssistant : ack
    end
    BrakingAssistant -> BrakingAssistant : endBrakingManeuver()
    BrakingAssistant -> DiagnosticLog : recordEvent()
else ttc above critical threshold
    par
        BrakingAssistant -> Driver : showDistanceWarning()
    else
        BrakingAssistant -> DiagnosticLog : logObservedRisk()
    end
end
@enduml

    Assistant->>Driver: acousticWarning()
    Assistant->>Assistant: initiateBrakingManeuver()
    loop until vehicle stationary
      Assistant->>Control: adjustBrakePressure()

    Assistant->>Assistant: endManeuver()
    Assistant->>Log: recordEvent()
  else ttc above threshold

      Assistant->>Driver: distanceWarning()
    end
    Assistant->>Log: logObservedRisk()
  end

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "BicycleSystemModel") {
    val crank = partDef(name = "Crank")
    val chain = partDef(name = "Chain")
    val rearWheel = partDef(name = "RearWheel")
    val drivetrain = partDef(name = "Drivetrain") {
        part(name = "crank", typeId = crank.id)
        part(name = "chain", typeId = chain.id)
        part(name = "rearWheel", typeId = rearWheel.id)
    }
    val handlebars = partDef(name = "Handlebars")
    val frontWheel = partDef(name = "FrontWheel")
    val steeringAssembly = partDef(name = "SteeringAssembly") {
        part(name = "handlebars", typeId = handlebars.id)
        part(name = "frontWheel", typeId = frontWheel.id)
    }
    val frame = partDef(name = "Frame")
    val brakingSystem = partDef(name = "BrakingSystem")
    val bicycleSystem = partDef(name = "BicycleSystem") {
        part(name = "frame", typeId = frame.id)
        part(name = "drivetrain", typeId = drivetrain.id)
        part(name = "steeringAssembly", typeId = steeringAssembly.id)
        part(name = "brakingSystem", typeId = brakingSystem.id)
    }
    bdd(name = "BicycleSystem BDD") {
        include(bicycleSystem)
        include(frame)
        include(drivetrain)
        include(steeringAssembly)
        include(brakingSystem)
        include(crank)
        include(chain)
        include(rearWheel)
        include(handlebars)
        include(frontWheel)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "ADAS Model") {
    val sensor = partDef(name = "Sensor", isAbstract = true)

    val camera = partDef(name = "Camera", specializes = sensor.id)
    val radar = partDef(name = "Radar", specializes = sensor.id)
    val lidar = partDef(name = "Lidar", specializes = sensor.id)

    val sensorSuite = partDef(name = "SensorSuite") {
        part(name = "cameras", typeId = camera.id)
        part(name = "radars", typeId = radar.id)
        part(name = "lidars", typeId = lidar.id)
    }

    val environmentModel = partDef(name = "EnvironmentModel")

    val fusionProcessingUnit = partDef(name = "FusionProcessingUnit") {
        part(name = "environmentModel", typeId = environmentModel.id)
    }

    val steeringSystem = partDef(name = "SteeringSystem")
    val brakingSystem = partDef(name = "BrakingSystem")

    val driverAssistanceControlUnit = partDef(name = "DriverAssistanceControlUnit") {
        part(name = "environmentModel", typeId = environmentModel.id)
        part(name = "steeringSystem", typeId = steeringSystem.id)
        part(name = "brakingSystem", typeId = brakingSystem.id)
    }

    val adasSubsystem = partDef(name = "ADASSubsystem") {
        part(name = "sensorSuite", typeId = sensorSuite.id)
        part(name = "fusionProcessingUnit", typeId = fusionProcessingUnit.id)
        part(name = "driverAssistanceControlUnit", typeId = driverAssistanceControlUnit.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "ADAS Subsystem BDD") {
        include(sensor)
        include(camera)
        include(radar)
        include(lidar)
        include(sensorSuite)
        include(environmentModel)
        include(fusionProcessingUnit)
        include(steeringSystem)
        include(brakingSystem)
        include(driverAssistanceControlUnit)
        include(adasSubsystem)
    }
}

sysml2Model(name = "WindTurbineModel") {
    val rotorBlade = partDef(name = "Rotor Blade", isAbstract = true)

    val gfrpBlade = partDef(name = "GFRP Blade")
    generalization(specificId = gfrpBlade.id, generalId = rotorBlade.id)

    val cfrpBlade = partDef(name = "CFRP Blade")
    generalization(specificId = cfrpBlade.id, generalId = rotorBlade.id)

    val hub = partDef(name = "Hub")

    val nacelle = partDef(name = "Nacelle")

    val tower = partDef(name = "Tower") {
        part(name = "nacelle", typeId = nacelle.id)
    }

    val pitchControl = partDef(name = "Pitch Control System")
    val yawControl = partDef(name = "Yaw Control System")
    val cms = partDef(name = "Condition Monitoring System")

        part(name = "pitchControl", typeId = pitchControl.id)

        part(name = "cms", typeId = cms.id)

    bdd(name = "Wind Turbine BDD") {

        include(gfrpBlade)
        include(cfrpBlade)

        include(gearbox)

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "AUTOSAR ECU Model") {
    // Hardware layer - Communication Controllers
    val communicationController = partDef(name = "Communication Controller")
    val canController = partDef(name = "CAN Controller")
    val linController = partDef(name = "LIN Controller")
    val ethernetController = partDef(name = "Ethernet Controller")

    val cpuCore = partDef(name = "CPU Core")
    val ram = partDef(name = "RAM")
    val flashMemory = partDef(name = "Flash Memory")

    val microcontroller = partDef(name = "Microcontroller") {
        part(name = "cpuCore", typeId = cpuCore.id)
        part(name = "ram", typeId = ram.id)
        part(name = "flashMemory", typeId = flashMemory.id)
        part(name = "canController", typeId = canController.id)
        part(name = "linController", typeId = linController.id)
        part(name = "ethernetController", typeId = ethernetController.id)
    }

    val hardwareLayer = partDef(name = "Hardware Layer") {
        part(name = "microcontroller", typeId = microcontroller.id)
    }

    // BSW layer
    val bswModule = partDef(name = "BSW Module")
    val mcal = partDef(name = "MCAL")
    val canStack = partDef(name = "CAN Communication Stack")
    val ethernetStack = partDef(name = "Ethernet Communication Stack")
    val os = partDef(name = "Operating System")
    val watchdog = partDef(name = "Watchdog")

    val bswLayer = partDef(name = "BSW Layer") {
        part(name = "mcal", typeId = mcal.id)
        part(name = "canStack", typeId = canStack.id)
        part(name = "ethernetStack", typeId = ethernetStack.id)
        part(name = "os", typeId = os.id)
        part(name = "watchdog", typeId = watchdog.id)
    }

    // Application layer
    val softwareComponent = partDef(name = "Software Component")
    val swcSensor = partDef(name = "Sensor SWC")
    val swcActuator = partDef(name = "Actuator SWC")
    val swcController = partDef(name = "Controller SWC")
    val vfb = partDef(name = "Virtual Functional Bus")

    val applicationLayer = partDef(name = "Application Layer") {
        part(name = "swcSensor", typeId = swcSensor.id)
        part(name = "swcActuator", typeId = swcActuator.id)
        part(name = "swcController", typeId = swcController.id)
        part(name = "vfb", typeId = vfb.id)
    }

    // Top-level ECU
    val ecu = partDef(name = "ECU") {
        part(name = "hardwareLayer", typeId = hardwareLayer.id)
        part(name = "bswLayer", typeId = bswLayer.id)
        part(name = "applicationLayer", typeId = applicationLayer.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "AUTOSAR ECU BDD") {
        include(ecu)
        include(hardwareLayer)
        include(microcontroller)
        include(cpuCore)
        include(ram)
        include(flashMemory)
        include(communicationController)
        include(canController)
        include(linController)
        include(ethernetController)
        include(bswLayer)
        include(bswModule)
        include(mcal)
        include(canStack)
        include(ethernetStack)
        include(os)
        include(watchdog)
        include(applicationLayer)
        include(softwareComponent)
        include(swcSensor)
        include(swcActuator)
        include(swcController)
        include(vfb)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "EarthObservationSatellite") {
    val payloadInstrument = partDef(name = "Payload Instrument", isAbstract = true)

    val opticalCamera = partDef(name = "Optical Camera")
    val sarRadar = partDef(name = "SAR Radar")

    val payloadSubsystem = partDef(name = "Payload Subsystem") {
        part(name = "opticalCamera", typeId = opticalCamera.id)
        part(name = "sarRadar", typeId = sarRadar.id)
    }

    val primaryStructure = partDef(name = "Primary Structure")
    val solarPanels = partDef(name = "Solar Panels")
    val heatShield = partDef(name = "Heat Shield")

    val structureThermalSubsystem = partDef(name = "Structure and Thermal Control") {
        part(name = "primaryStructure", typeId = primaryStructure.id)
        part(name = "solarPanels", typeId = solarPanels.id)
        part(name = "heatShield", typeId = heatShield.id)
    }

    val batteryArray = partDef(name = "Battery Array")
    val solarPowerRegulator = partDef(name = "Solar Power Regulator")
    val pdu = partDef(name = "Power Distribution Unit")

    val electricalPowerSubsystem = partDef(name = "Electrical Power Supply") {
        part(name = "batteryArray", typeId = batteryArray.id)
        part(name = "solarPowerRegulator", typeId = solarPowerRegulator.id)
        part(name = "pdu", typeId = pdu.id)
    }

    val starSensor = partDef(name = "Star Sensor")
    val reactionWheels = partDef(name = "Reaction Wheels")
    val thrusters = partDef(name = "Thrusters")

    val aocsSubsystem = partDef(name = "Attitude and Orbit Control System") {
        part(name = "starSensor", typeId = starSensor.id)
        part(name = "reactionWheels", typeId = reactionWheels.id)
        part(name = "thrusters", typeId = thrusters.id)
    }

    val onBoardComputer = partDef(name = "On-Board Computer")
    val rfTransmitter = partDef(name = "RF Transmitter")
    val rfReceiver = partDef(name = "RF Receiver")

    val ttcSubsystem = partDef(name = "Telemetry, Tracking and Command") {
        part(name = "onBoardComputer", typeId = onBoardComputer.id)
        part(name = "rfTransmitter", typeId = rfTransmitter.id)
        part(name = "rfReceiver", typeId = rfReceiver.id)
    }

    val satellite = partDef(name = "Earth Observation Satellite") {
        part(name = "payloadSubsystem", typeId = payloadSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "structureThermalSubsystem", typeId = structureThermalSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "electricalPowerSubsystem", typeId = electricalPowerSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "aocsSubsystem", typeId = aocsSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "ttcSubsystem", typeId = ttcSubsystem.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "Earth Observation Satellite BDD") {
        include(satellite)
        include(payloadSubsystem)
        include(payloadInstrument)
        include(opticalCamera)
        include(sarRadar)
        include(structureThermalSubsystem)
        include(primaryStructure)
        include(solarPanels)
        include(heatShield)
        include(electricalPowerSubsystem)
        include(batteryArray)
        include(solarPowerRegulator)
        include(pdu)
        include(aocsSubsystem)
        include(starSensor)
        include(reactionWheels)
        include(thrusters)
        include(ttcSubsystem)
        include(onBoardComputer)
        include(rfTransmitter)
        include(rfReceiver)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "AutonomousVehicleL4") {

    // ---------- Perception ----------
    val perceptionSensor = partDef(name = "Perception Sensor")

    val cameraCluster = partDef(name = "Camera Cluster", specializes = perceptionSensor.id)
    val radarArray = partDef(name = "Radar Array", specializes = perceptionSensor.id)
    val lidarScanner = partDef(name = "Lidar Scanner", specializes = perceptionSensor.id)
    val gpsIns = partDef(name = "GPS/INS", specializes = perceptionSensor.id)

    val perception = partDef(name = "Perception") {
        part(name = "cameraCluster", typeId = cameraCluster.id)
        part(name = "radarArray", typeId = radarArray.id)
        part(name = "lidarScanner", typeId = lidarScanner.id)
        part(name = "gpsIns", typeId = gpsIns.id)
    }

    // ---------- Processing Platform ----------
    val gpu = partDef(name = "GPU")
    val cpu = partDef(name = "CPU")
    val dram = partDef(name = "DRAM")

    val avCompute = partDef(name = "AV Compute") {
        part(name = "gpu", typeId = gpu.id)
        part(name = "cpu", typeId = cpu.id)
        part(name = "dram", typeId = dram.id)
    }

    val safetyMonitor = partDef(name = "Safety Monitor Computer")

    val processingPlatform = partDef(name = "Processing Platform") {
        part(name = "avCompute", typeId = avCompute.id)
        part(name = "safetyMonitor", typeId = safetyMonitor.id)
    }

    // ---------- Localization and Mapping ----------
    val hdMapUnit = partDef(name = "HD Map Unit")
    val localizationModule = partDef(name = "Real-Time Localization Module")

    val localizationMapping = partDef(name = "Localization and Mapping") {
        part(name = "hdMapUnit", typeId = hdMapUnit.id)
        part(name = "localizationModule", typeId = localizationModule.id)
    }

    // ---------- Driving Decision and Planning ----------
    val pathPlanning = partDef(name = "Path Planning Module")
    val behaviorDecision = partDef(name = "Behavior Decision Module")

    val drivingDecisionPlanning = partDef(name = "Driving Decision and Planning") {
        part(name = "pathPlanning", typeId = pathPlanning.id)
        part(name = "behaviorDecision", typeId = behaviorDecision.id)
    }

    // ---------- Vehicle Control ----------
    val steerByWire = partDef(name = "Steer-by-Wire Unit")
    val brakeByWire = partDef(name = "Brake-by-Wire Unit")
    val driveControl = partDef(name = "Drive Control")

    val vehicleControl = partDef(name = "Vehicle Control") {
        part(name = "steerByWire", typeId = steerByWire.id)
        part(name = "brakeByWire", typeId = brakeByWire.id)
        part(name = "driveControl", typeId = driveControl.id)
    }

    // ---------- Communication ----------
    val v2xModule = partDef(name = "V2X Module")
    val telematicsModule = partDef(name = "Telematics Module")

    val communication = partDef(name = "Communication") {
        part(name = "v2xModule", typeId = v2xModule.id)
        part(name = "telematicsModule", typeId = telematicsModule.id)
    }

    // ---------- Top-Level Vehicle System ----------
    val autonomousVehicle = partDef(name = "Autonomous Vehicle System") {
        part(name = "perception", typeId = perception.id)
        part(name = "processingPlatform", typeId = processingPlatform.id)
        part(name = "localizationMapping", typeId = localizationMapping.id)
        part(name = "drivingDecisionPlanning", typeId = drivingDecisionPlanning.id)
        part(name = "vehicleControl", typeId = vehicleControl.id)
        part(name = "communication", typeId = communication.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "Autonomous Vehicle L4 BDD") {
        include(autonomousVehicle)
        include(perception)
        include(perceptionSensor)
        include(cameraCluster)
        include(radarArray)
        include(lidarScanner)
        include(gpsIns)
        include(processingPlatform)
        include(avCompute)
        include(gpu)
        include(cpu)
        include(dram)
        include(safetyMonitor)
        include(localizationMapping)
        include(hdMapUnit)
        include(localizationModule)
        include(drivingDecisionPlanning)
        include(pathPlanning)
        include(behaviorDecision)
        include(vehicleControl)
        include(steerByWire)
        include(brakeByWire)
        include(driveControl)
        include(communication)
        include(v2xModule)
        include(telematicsModule)
    }
}
